---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for Ragnarok
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement
A clear description of the problem or need. Ex: "I'm frustrated when..."

## Proposed Solution
A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered
A description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Case
Describe who would benefit from this feature and how they would use it.

## Mockups / Examples
If applicable, add mockups, wireframes, or examples from other products.

## Additional Context
Add any other context, screenshots, or references about the feature request here.

## Implementation Notes
If you have technical suggestions for how this could be implemented, add them here.
